head.title: AERIS-10P Phase Shifter Array Expansion Board
head.description: Phase shifter expansion board: 16x HMC647ALP5E in 4 groups, SPI daisy-chain, 5V supply distribution, RF power distribution, 16x 2.92mm SMA outputs. AERIS-10P Rev 1.0
head.comments: Import into EasyEDA Standard via File > Import > EasyEDA JSON. One board for TX, one for RX.

shape: T‾L‾120‾145‾0‾0.9‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 145‾Rev 1.0  |  2026-07-14  |  16x HMC647ALP5E | SPI Daisy-Chain | 16x 2.92mm RF Outputs‾#555555‾
T‾L‾120‾185‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 185‾ORDER TWO BOARDS: one for TX array (connect to SPI1), one for RX array (connect to SPI2)‾#880000‾
T‾L‾120‾200‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 200‾Substrate: Rogers RO4003C 4-layer. All RF traces 50 ohm (1.08mm width on 0.508mm RO4003C). Immersion gold finish.‾#880000‾
T‾L‾130‾380‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 380‾Note: 3.3V SPI from STM32 -> 5V level shift needed! Use TXB0104 or 100-ohm series resistors.‾#880000‾
T‾L‾130‾490‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 490‾RF INPUT (each U1-U4): from 1:4 sub-divider (Group A)‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾505‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 505‾RF OUTPUT (each): to J_ANT[0..3] (2.92mm SMA female)‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾535‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 535‾GND: solid ground plane under each IC‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾550‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 550‾Phase range: 0-360 degrees in 64 steps (5.625 deg LSB)‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾580‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 580‾Phase update time: 2us after SPI CS rising edge‾#003366‾
T‾L‾710‾475‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 710 475‾SPI chain: U8->U7->U6->U5, continues from Group A output‾#003366‾
T‾L‾710‾490‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 710 490‾RF from sub-divider Group B, output to J_ANT[4..7]‾#003366‾
T‾L‾710‾520‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 710 520‾Total shift register: 16 x 8 bits = 128-bit chain‾#003366‾
T‾L‾710‾535‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 710 535‾SPI transaction: send 16 bytes (one per shifter), assert CS‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾685‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 685‾SPI chain continues from Group B output‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾700‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 700‾Placement: physically near corresponding antenna elements‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾715‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 715‾Keep SPI data traces <50mm for signal integrity‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾730‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 730‾Use ground via isolation between RF and SPI traces‾#003366‾
T‾L‾710‾685‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 710 685‾Last in chain: U16 receives data first (MSB order)‾#003366‾
T‾L‾710‾700‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 710 700‾U13 MISO -> J1 MISO (chain ends here)‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾880‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 880‾J2: 2.92mm SMA female (main RF input from PA output or LNA combiner)‾#660000‾
T‾L‾130‾895‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 895‾1:4 Wilkinson Level 1: splits input to Group A,B,C,D inputs‾#660000‾
T‾L‾130‾910‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 910‾1:4 Wilkinson Level 2 (per group): splits to 4 elements each‾#660000‾
T‾L‾130‾940‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 940‾Wilkinson resistors: 100-ohm 0402 between each split pair‾#660000‾
T‾L‾130‾1075‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 1075‾Arrangement: 4 groups of 4, matching physical antenna array layout‾#333333‾
T‾L‾130‾1105‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 1105‾Cable to antenna: RG-405 semi-rigid, 80mm, phase-matched within +/-3 degrees‾#333333‾
T‾L‾130‾1120‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 1120‾Phase matching: measure with VNA after assembly, trim cables‾#333333‾
T‾L‾130‾1135‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 1135‾Insertion loss per connector: 0.1 dB typical at 10 GHz‾#333333‾
T‾L‾120‾1220‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1220‾+5V bus: 2mm trace running entire board length, 1uF per group + 100nF per IC‾#880000‾
T‾L‾120‾1235‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1235‾GND plane: solid copper pour layer 2, via stitching every 5mm‾#880000‾
T‾L‾120‾1250‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1250‾Ferrite bead (BLM18AG601SN1D or similar) on 5V entry to board‾#880000‾
T‾L‾120‾1380‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1380‾FABRICATION: Rogers RO4003C, 4-layer, immersion gold. Order from PCBWay. Specify controlled impedance 50-ohm.‾#006600‾
T‾L‾120‾1400‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1400‾ASSEMBLY: Reflow solder HMC647A at 260C peak. X-ray QFN inspection. Clean with IPA. Inspect RF connectors.‾#006600‾
